hero.badge: Open to Fresher / Intern · Ho Chi Minh City
hero.bio: A hardworking developer who believes in learning by doing. Currently studying Information Technology at Cao Thang Technical College, specializing in the Next.js ecosystem — React, TypeScript, Node.js.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Developer, endless learner
about.bio1: Hello! I'm Nguyen Quoc Duong, a Frontend Developer specializing in the Next.js ecosystem — React, Node.js, TypeScript.
about.bio2: Passionate about building high-performance web applications and solving complex system problems.
about.bio3: Outside of coding, I spend time researching new skills to continuously grow and develop myself.
about.education: Cao Thang Technical College · Information Technology · HCMC

projects.pageSubtitle: Things I've built with passion, dedication, and logical thinking

list.title: Clothing Store Management System
list.desc: A desktop application designed to manage inventory, sales revenue, and employee data for a fashion store. Optimized heavy database queries, implemented role-based user authentication, and designed an intuitive WinForms UI.

list.title: Personal Portfolio Website
list.desc: A personal portfolio website showcasing my profile and projects. Fully optimized for SEO, supports dark/light mode toggling, and integrates a seamless internationalization system (Next-intl).
